metadata.description: Batch 46 — additional Oxford 5000 words 1501-1600; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: the ability to perform consistently without failure
words.definitionTh: ความน่าเชื่อถือ
words.example: Preventive maintenance improves system reliability.

words.definitionEn: to reduce pain, pressure, or difficulty
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “relieve”.

words.definitionEn: feeling less worried after a problem ends
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “relieved”.

words.definitionEn: unwilling and hesitant
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reluctant”.

words.definitionEn: the part left after the rest is used
words.definitionTh: ส่วนที่เหลือ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “remainder”.

words.definitionEn: what remains after destruction or death
words.definitionTh: ซากที่เหลือ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “remains”.

words.definitionEn: unusual and worthy of attention
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “remarkable”.

words.definitionEn: in a surprising or notable way
words.definitionTh: อย่างน่าทึ่ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “remarkably”.

words.definitionEn: a treatment or solution for a problem
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “remedy”.

words.definitionEn: something that helps a person remember
words.definitionTh: การเตือนความจำ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reminder”.

words.definitionEn: the act of taking something away
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “removal”.

words.definitionEn: to cause something to be in a state or display it
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ / แสดงผล
words.example: The dashboard renders each chart correctly.

words.definitionEn: to extend validity or begin again
words.example: Renew the calibration certificate before expiry.

words.definitionEn: famous and respected
words.definitionTh: มีชื่อเสียง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “renowned”.

words.definitionEn: payment for temporary use
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rental”.

words.definitionEn: a person or thing taking another’s place
words.example: Keep a replacement sensor in stock.

words.definitionEn: according to information that has been reported
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reportedly”.

words.definitionEn: the activity of providing information or reports
words.example: Automated reporting reduces manual work.

words.definitionEn: the act of showing or standing for something
words.definitionTh: การเป็นตัวแทน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “representation”.

words.definitionEn: to make a copy or produce offspring
words.definitionTh: ทำซ้ำ / สืบพันธุ์
words.example: The team could reproduce the fault.

words.definitionEn: the process of copying or producing offspring
words.definitionTh: การทำซ้ำ / การสืบพันธุ์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reproduction”.

words.definitionEn: a state governed by elected representatives
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “republic”.

words.definitionEn: to look or be similar to
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “resemble”.

words.definitionEn: to live in a place
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “reside”.

words.definitionEn: the place where someone lives
words.definitionTh: ที่อยู่อาศัย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “residence”.

words.definitionEn: relating to places where people live
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับที่อยู่อาศัย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “residential”.

words.definitionEn: material left after a process
words.example: Clean product residue from the lens.

words.definitionEn: to leave a job officially
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “resign”.

words.definitionEn: the act of officially leaving a job
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “resignation”.

words.definitionEn: the ability to oppose force or change
words.definitionTh: ความต้านทาน
words.example: Measure the electrical resistance.

words.definitionEn: a formal decision or level of image detail
words.definitionTh: มติ / ความละเอียด
words.example: Use a camera with sufficient resolution.

words.definitionEn: belonging separately to each of two or more things
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “respective”.

words.definitionEn: in the same order as items already mentioned
words.definitionTh: ตามลำดับกัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “respectively”.

words.definitionEn: the process of returning something to its former state
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “restoration”.

words.definitionEn: to bring back to an earlier good condition
words.example: Restore the previous configuration.

words.definitionEn: control over behavior or movement
words.definitionTh: การยับยั้ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “restraint”.

words.definitionEn: to limit an action or amount
words.example: Restrict access to authorized users.

words.definitionEn: a rule or condition that limits activity
words.example: Document each operating restriction.

words.definitionEn: to begin again after a pause
words.example: Resume production after approval.

words.definitionEn: a written summary of education and work experience
words.definitionTh: ประวัติย่อ

words.definitionEn: the sale of goods directly to customers
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “retail”.

words.definitionEn: the period after ending paid work

words.definitionEn: to move backward or withdraw

words.definitionEn: to find and bring back stored information
words.example: Retrieve the record from the database.

words.definitionTh: การเปิดเผยครั้งสำคัญ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “revelation”.

words.definitionEn: harm done in return for harm
words.definitionTh: การแก้แค้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “revenge”.

words.definitionEn: income received by an organization
words.example: Estimate the annual revenue impact.

words.definitionEn: opposite in direction; to change to the opposite
words.example: Reverse the motor only under safe conditions.

words.definitionEn: a corrected or updated version
words.definitionTh: การแก้ไขฉบับ
words.example: Issue a new procedure revision.

words.definitionEn: the return of activity or strength
words.definitionTh: การฟื้นคืน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “revival”.

words.definitionEn: to bring back activity or strength
words.example: The update revived the old system.

words.definitionEn: causing a major and fundamental change
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “revolutionary”.

words.definitionEn: language intended to persuade or impress
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rhetoric”.

words.definitionEn: extremely unreasonable or silly
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ridiculous”.

words.definitionEn: a long gun fired from the shoulder
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rifle”.

words.definitionEn: violent public disorder
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “riot”.

words.definitionEn: to tear something quickly
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rip”.

words.definitionEn: involving a chance of loss or failure
words.example: Bypassing the interlock is risky.

words.definitionEn: a formal repeated ceremony
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ritual”.

words.definitionEn: a competing person or organization
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rival”.

words.definitionEn: to take property illegally by force
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rob”.

words.definitionEn: the crime of taking property by force
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “robbery”.

words.definitionEn: strong and able to withstand problems
words.example: The model is robust under changing light.

words.definitionEn: to move gently backward and forward
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rock”.

words.definitionEn: a vehicle or device driven by powerful thrust
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rocket”.

words.definitionEn: a long straight bar
words.example: Check the guide rod for wear.

words.definitionEn: a relationship involving emotional love
words.definitionTh: ความรักเชิงชู้สาว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “romance”.

words.definitionEn: a person new to an activity
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rookie”.

words.definitionEn: a flowering plant with scented petals
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rose”.

words.definitionEn: a list of names assigned to duties
words.example: Update the training roster.

words.definitionEn: to turn around a central point
words.example: Rotate the camera mount slightly.

words.definitionEn: movement around a central point
words.example: Measure shaft rotation speed.

words.definitionEn: approximately or not exactly
words.example: The test took roughly one hour.

words.definitionEn: to destroy; a state of severe damage
words.definitionTh: ทำลาย / ซาก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ruin”.

words.definitionEn: an official decision by a court or authority
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ruling”.

words.definitionEn: unverified information passed between people
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “rumor”.

words.definitionEn: to give up something valuable for a purpose
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sacrifice”.

words.definitionEn: a person officially recognized as holy
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “saint”.

words.definitionEn: for the purpose or benefit of
words.definitionTh: เพื่อประโยชน์ของ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sake”.

words.definitionEn: an official penalty or restriction
words.definitionTh: มาตรการลงโทษ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “sanction”.

words.definitionEn: the feeling of having needs or expectations met
words.definitionTh: ความพึงพอใจ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “satisfaction”.

words.definitionEn: the right or opportunity to influence a decision
words.definitionTh: สิทธิ์ในการพูด

words.definitionEn: an event causing public shame or outrage
words.definitionTh: เรื่องอื้อฉาว

words.definitionEn: to cause sudden fear; a period of fear

words.definitionEn: spread over a wide area

words.example: The report provides a clear example of “scattered”.

words.definitionTh: สถานการณ์จำลอง

words.definitionEn: a person with advanced academic knowledge
words.definitionTh: นักวิชาการ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “scholar”.

words.definitionEn: money awarded to support study
words.definitionTh: ทุนการศึกษา
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “scholarship”.

words.definitionEn: the range and limits of an activity
words.example: Define the project scope clearly.

words.definitionEn: the process of checking for suitability or risk
words.definitionTh: การคัดกรอง
words.example: Use screening to remove invalid samples.

words.definitionEn: a threaded fastener; to fasten by turning

words.definitionEn: used to introduce a second point

words.example: The report provides a clear example of “secondly”.

words.definitionEn: not connected with religion
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “secular”.

words.definitionEn: a person trying to find something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “seeker”.

words.definitionEn: in a way that appears to be true

words.definitionEn: a distinct part of a larger whole
words.example: Analyze each production segment.

words.definitionEn: to take control of something quickly
words.example: The clamp seizes the part securely.

words.definitionEn: not often
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “seldom”.
